message:
fix(daemon): increase WAMR stack to match WASM build settings

- Increase daemon stack_size from 64MB to 128MB to match
  build.zig wasm_static_exe.stack_size setting
- Add debug logging for instance creation (disabled by default)

The stack size mismatch could cause issues with deep call stacks.
Note: WASM/AOT still has "out of bounds memory access" error
that requires deeper investigation (QuickJS initialization issue).
